repos.name: awesome
repos.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics
repos.summary_short: A massively popular curated index of awesome lists covering software, tech, and many other topics.
repos.summary_medium: This repository collects and organizes links to high-quality "awesome lists" on a wide range of interesting topics. It helps people quickly discover curated resources, tools, and communities without searching from scratch. Its enormous star count and top weekly ranking make it one of GitHub's most visible resource hubs.

repos.name: freeCodeCamp
repos.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
repos.summary_short: freeCodeCamp is a popular open-source platform for learning coding, math, and computer science for free.
repos.summary_medium: This repository contains the open-source codebase and curriculum behind freeCodeCamp.org, a free learning platform for programming, math, and computer science. Built with TypeScript and covering topics like JavaScript, React, Node.js, and D3, it supports structured learning through curriculum and certification. It's trending because of its massive community, broad educational scope, and strong open-source adoption.

repos.name: free-programming-books
repos.description: :books: Freely available programming books
repos.summary_short: A massively popular curated list of free programming books and learning resources for developers worldwide.
repos.summary_medium: This repository collects freely available programming books and educational resources in one place, making it easier for developers to discover quality learning material. Its broad usefulness, simple list-based format, and strong community contribution model have helped it become one of GitHub’s most starred educational repositories. Its high weekly ranking reflects continued interest from learners and contributors alike.

repos.name: openclaw
repos.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
repos.summary_short: OpenClaw is a TypeScript personal AI assistant focused on cross-platform use and data ownership.
repos.summary_medium: OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant built in TypeScript for use across operating systems and platforms. Its positioning emphasizes a personal assistant experience while highlighting an "own your data" approach. It is trending strongly due to its broad AI assistant appeal, cross-platform framing, and exceptionally high GitHub popularity.

repos.name: developer-roadmap
repos.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.
repos.summary_short: Interactive developer roadmaps and guides that help engineers plan and grow their careers.
repos.summary_medium: This repository provides interactive roadmaps, guides, and educational content for developers across many roles and technology stacks. It helps learners and working engineers understand what to study for areas like frontend, backend, DevOps, QA, and software architecture. It's trending because it offers a broad, structured learning resource with strong community adoption and coverage of popular development paths.

repos.name: awesome-python
repos.description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources
repos.summary_short: A hugely popular curated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and learning resources.
repos.summary_medium: This repository organizes a broad, opinionated collection of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and other resources in one place. It helps developers discover useful packages and ecosystem options faster, whether they are learning Python or building projects. Its massive star count and long-standing value as a go-to reference make it consistently trend.

repos.name: awesome-selfhosted
repos.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

repos.summary_medium: This repository curates Free Software network services and web applications that can be hosted on your own servers. It helps users discover self-hosted alternatives across many categories, with a strong focus on privacy, hosting, and open software. Its massive star count and top weekly ranking make it a standout trending resource for the self-hosting community.

repos.name: react
repos.description: The library for web and native user interfaces.

repos.summary_medium: React is a JavaScript library for building declarative user interfaces for web and native applications. It helps developers create UI components in a reusable way and is a foundational tool in modern frontend development. Its massive adoption, large community, and enduring influence make it consistently trend on GitHub.

repos.name: linux

repos.summary_medium: This repository contains the source code for the Linux kernel, the core software layer used by many operating systems and devices. Written primarily in C, it is one of the most important open source infrastructure projects and attracts sustained attention from developers worldwide. Its high star count and top weekly ranking reflect its enduring relevance and massive community interest.

repos.name: computer-science

It helps learners follow a comprehensive curriculum without enrolling in a formal degree program. Its massive community adoption, broad usefulness, and strong GitHub ranking make it a consistently trending educational resource.

repos.name: tensorflow

repos.summary_short: TensorFlow is a widely used open-source machine learning framework for building and running deep learning models.
repos.summary_medium: TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework focused on building and deploying deep learning and neural network workloads. It supports distributed computing and has strong C++ and Python relevance based on the repository metadata. Its massive star count and high weekly ranking indicate continued broad adoption and strong community interest.

repos.name: claw-code
repos.description: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.
repos.summary_short: A viral Rust-based project built with oh-my-codex that became one of GitHub’s fastest-growing repos.
repos.summary_medium: claw-code is a Rust repository described by its authors as "finally unlocked" and built using oh-my-codex. While its exact functionality is not specified in the metadata, it stands out for extraordinary community traction, reportedly becoming the fastest repository to surpass 100K stars. Its massive star and fork counts, plus a high weekly rank, explain why it is trending so prominently.

repos.name: ohmyzsh
repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
repos.summary_short: A popular framework for managing Zsh configs with hundreds of plugins, themes, and built-in auto-updates.
repos.summary_medium: Oh My Zsh helps users manage and customize their Zsh shell configuration through a large collection of optional plugins and themes. It includes support for many common developer tools and workflows, plus an auto-update mechanism to keep setups current. It's trending because of its massive community adoption, extensive customization options, and long-standing popularity in terminal productivity.

repos.name: n8n

repos.summary_medium: n8n is a fair-code workflow automation platform for connecting apps, APIs, and data flows through a visual builder and custom code. It supports self-hosted and cloud deployments, includes native AI capabilities, and offers 400+ integrations for building automations quickly. Its large community, broad integration coverage, and flexible low-code approach help explain why it is trending.

repos.summary_medium: AutoGPT is a Python project focused on making AI accessible for both end users and developers building on top of it. It centers on agentic and autonomous AI workflows, with support for LLM-driven agents across ecosystems like OpenAI, Claude, and Llama-related APIs. Its massive community, broad AI-agent appeal, and strong GitHub momentum make it a consistent trending repository.

Its massive adoption, strong ecosystem, and versatility across platforms help explain why it continues trending.
